text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Looks like I’m racing... this girl next.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
She tends to hit the gas the minute she sees the
stretch... So if just make her use up her stamina on
the second corner...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Now this is going to be a fun race. ♪
